task_completion.description: Organize the bookmarks into the five specified folders on the bookmark bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager. There should be exactly five folders visible: 'Standards & Guidelines', 'Evaluation Tools', 'Assistive Tech', 'ARIA & Patterns', and 'Personal'.

task_completion.description: Set the default font size to 24 and the minimum font size to 18.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome 'Customize fonts' settings page (chrome://settings/fonts). The 'Font size' slider/value should be at 24, and the 'Minimum font size' slider/value should be at 18.

task_completion.description: Configure the specified Chrome flags for dark mode, smooth scrolling, and experimental features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the chrome://flags page. 'Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents' should be set to 'Enabled', 'Smooth Scrolling' should be set to 'Disabled', and 'Experimental Web Platform features' should be set to 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Create custom search engine shortcuts for WCAG and MDN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome 'Manage search engines and site search' settings page. There should be entries with the shortcut 'wcag' pointing to w3.org and 'mdn' pointing to developer.mozilla.org.

task_completion.description: Set the download directory and enable the prompt to ask where to save files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Downloads settings page (chrome://settings/downloads). The 'Location' should be set to '/home/ga/Documents/WCAG_Audits' (or ~/Documents/WCAG_Audits), and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' must be turned on.

task_completion.description: Block third-party cookies in Chrome settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome 'Third-party cookies' settings page (chrome://settings/cookies). The option 'Block third-party cookies' should be selected.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser UI (Settings, Flags, Bookmark Manager) being interacted with, rather than terminal windows editing JSON preferences files.

integrity.description: Verify bookmarks were organized in the actual browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folders must appear on the actual Chrome bookmark bar or within the Chrome Bookmark Manager, not just typed out in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify settings were changed in the actual browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Font, download, cookie, and search engine configurations must be visible in the official Chrome settings pages (chrome://settings/*).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Standards & Guidelines', 'Evaluation Tools', 'Assistive Tech', 'ARIA & Patterns', 'Personal'. Expected download directory: '/home/ga/Documents/WCAG_Audits'. Expected search shortcuts: 'wcag' and 'mdn'. Note: Visually verify the exact folder name 'Standards & Guidelines' is present on the bookmark bar, as requested in the task description.
